The remake will debut on Xbox Series S / X, PC, and PS5 on July 28th. Today's mission trailer includes a first look at Operation: Meteorite, a new three-mission […]
content: As part of its Xbox Games Showcase on Sunday, Microsoft revealed new details about Halo: Campaign Evolved, the upcoming remake of Halo: Combat Evolved’s campaign mode. The remake will debut on Xbox Series S / X, PC, and PS5 on July 28th. Today’s mission trailer includes a first look at Operation: Meteorite, a new three-mission story arc in Halo: Campaign Evolved. It takes place a year before the events of the first game and features Master Chief and Sgt. Johnson. Microsoft announced Campaign Evolved last year, calling it a “modern evolution” of the original story. The game is built in Unreal Engine 5 and features “stunning new 4K visuals, updated animations, remastered music, and re-recorded voice lines.” There are also three brand-new “prequel” missions. Halo Studios is adding a few weapons from later titles to the game, like the energy sword and the battle rifle. And you’ll also be able to play two-player local split-screen co-op and up to four-player co-op online. My colleague Tom Warren got to play a demo of Campaign Evolved, and while he said that it “looks and feels distinctively Halo,” he noted, “I realized there’s a lot going on in Campaign Evolved beyond its Unreal Engine 5-powered visuals.” Microsoft is starting preorders for Halo: Campaign Evolved today, with a $69.99 premium edition providing early access to the game on July 23rd. There’s even a $199.99 collector’s edition that includes a 12-inch “Dark Horse” Master Chief statue, a light-up LED Cortana chip, and more. Halo: Campaign Evolved will debut on Xbox Series S / X, PC, and PS5 on July 28th.
chineseTitle: Halo: Campaign Evolved 将于 7 月 28 日上线
chineseSummary: 作为周日 Xbox 游戏展示的一部分，微软透露了有关《光环：战役进化》的新细节，这是即将重制的《光环：战斗进化》的战役模式。重制版将于 7 月 28 日在 Xbox Series S / X、PC 和 PS5 上首次亮相。今天的任务预告片首先介绍了“陨石行动”，这是一项新的三项任务 […]
chineseContent: 作为周日 Xbox 游戏展示的一部分，微软透露了有关《光环：战役进化》的新细节，这是即将重制的《光环：战斗进化》战役模式。重制版将于 7 月 28 日在 Xbox Series S / X、PC 和 PS5 上首次亮相。今天的任务预告片首先介绍了“光环：战役进化”中的新三任务故事线“陨石行动”。它发生在第一款游戏事件发生前一年，主角是士官长和中士。约翰逊.微软去年宣布了“Campaign Evolved”，称其为原始故事的“现代演变”。该游戏采用虚幻引擎 5 构建，具有“令人惊叹的全新 4K 视觉效果、更新的动画、重新制作的音乐和重新录制的语音”。还有三个全新的“前传”任务。 Halo Studios 正在向游戏中添加一些后来作品中的武器，例如能量剑和战斗步枪。您还可以玩两人本地分屏合作游戏和最多四人在线合作游戏。我的同事汤姆·沃伦（Tom Warren）玩了《Campaign Evolved》的演示版，虽然他说它“看起来和感觉都与《光环》截然不同”，但他指出，“我意识到《Campaign Evolved》中除了虚幻引擎 5 驱动的视觉效果之外，还有很多其他内容。”微软今天开始预订 Halo: Campaign Evolved，高级版售价 69.99 美元，可于 7 月 23 日抢先体验该游戏。甚至还有价值 199.99 美元的收藏版，其中包括 12 英寸“黑马”士官长雕像、发光 LED Cortana 芯片等。 《光环：战役进化》将于 7 月 28 日在 Xbox Series S / X、PC 和 PS5 上首次亮相。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
